title: Assistant Manager, Hospital Food Services ( Govt Healthcare ) UP 6K #HYT
description:
Senior / Assistant Manager, Group Hospitality Services (Food Service)

Sector: Healthcare / Hospitality Operations
Salary: $4,300 – $6,300 per month
Employment Type: Permanent

This role oversees end-to-end food service operations to ensure patient, staff, and catering meals are prepared and delivered safely, accurately, and on time. The successful candidate must be hands-on in kitchen operations while also managing administrative work, reporting, and stakeholder coordination.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Oversee daily food service operations across control room, store, catering, dishing, and assembly areas
  • Manage manpower planning, hiring, deployment, and mobilisation
  • Ensure staff training and vaccination compliance
  • Manage food service contracts and monitor vendor performance
  • Ensure compliance with food safety, workplace safety, and fire safety standards
  • Drive emergency preparedness and business continuity planning
  • Work closely with Executive Chef and production teams on inpatient, staff, and catering meals
  • Lead workflow improvement, automation, waste reduction, and sustainability initiatives
  • Handle escalated patient complaints and feedback
  • Prepare and submit monthly food service reports
  • Conduct monthly contract payment checks for stewarding services
  • Maintain proper documentation and records
  • Perform ad-hoc duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Degree in Food & Beverage Management, Hospitality, Nutrition, or related discipline
  • At least 5 years of supervisory or managerial experience in hospital, hotel, restaurant, or high-volume food service operations

All qualified applicants, please click “ APPLY NOW”

Or you may send in your resume to:

Whatsapp: https://wa.me/+6597430026  

Email : kimlow@recruitexpress.com.sg
